home.title: OpenCartable
home.subtitle: Compose your courses, organize your resources and share them with your students through a simple link — no account needed.
home.hint: The course editor is coming soon.
home.metaTitle: OpenCartable — compose courses and share them by link
home.metaDescription: OpenCartable, a free self-hosted teaching platform: compose your courses, organize your resources and share them with your students through a simple link, no account needed.

markdownField.previewEmpty: Nothing to show yet — write some markdown in the editor.
markdownField.mermaidMathNote: LaTeX formulas are not rendered inside Mermaid nodes; place them in the text, around the diagram.

markdownHelp.title: Formatting help
markdownHelp.intro: The editor combines three languages: Markdown for text, LaTeX for formulas and Mermaid for diagrams.

latex.title: Formulas (LaTeX)
latex.intro: Rendered by KaTeX. An invalid formula shows in red without breaking the rest of the block.
latex.block: Centered formula, on its own line

mermaid.title: Diagrams (Mermaid)
mermaid.intro: Describe a diagram in a code block tagged “mermaid”; it is rendered automatically in the preview.
mermaid.types: Mermaid also supports sequence diagrams, Gantt charts, pie charts and many more.
mermaid.mathNote: LaTeX (`$…$`) is not rendered inside Mermaid nodes: put your formulas in the text, around the diagram.

courseChat.title: Assistant
courseChat.emptyHint: It will soon help you write and enrich this course.
